Package javadraw

Class Renderable

java.lang.Object
javadraw.Renderable
All Implemented Interfaces:
DrawableObject, MultiRenderableMember
Direct Known Subclasses:
CustomPolygon, Image, Oval, Polygon, Rectangle, RoundedRectangle, Text, Triangle
public abstract class Renderable extends Object implements DrawableObject, MultiRenderableMember

    • center

      public Location center()
      Get the center of the Renderable
      Returns:
      a Location representing the centroid of the Renderable

    • center

      public Location center(Location newCenter)
      Move the Renderable to a new position by repositioning its center.
      Parameters:
      newCenter - the new Center Location to move to
      Returns:
      the new center Location

    • center

      public Location center(double x, double y)
      Move the Renderable to a new position by repositioning its center.
      Parameters:
      x - the new x-value to move the center to
      y - the new y-value to move the center to
      Returns:
      the new center Location

    • move

      public void move(double dx, double dy)
      Move the object by a specific distance on both the x and y axes
      Specified by:
      move in interface DrawableObject
      Specified by:
      move in interface MultiRenderableMember
      Parameters:
      dx - the distance along the x-axis to move
      dy - the distance along the y-axis to move

    • move

      public void move(Location location)
      Move by a passed Location's x and y values. (NOTE: Uses a Location's x and y values as dx and dy values).
      Specified by:
      move in interface DrawableObject
      Specified by:
      move in interface MultiRenderableMember
      Parameters:
      location - the Location to pull dx and dy from

    • moveTo

      public void moveTo(double x, double y)
      Move the Renderable to a new Location.
      Specified by:
      moveTo in interface DrawableObject
      Parameters:
      x - the new position along the x-axis
      y - the new position along the y-axis

      Specified by:
      moveTo in interface DrawableObject
      Specified by:
      moveTo in interface MultiRenderableMember
      Parameters:
      location - the new Location to move to

      public double rotation(double rotation)

      Parameters:

      Returns:
      the new rotation (in degrees)

    • rotate

      public void rotate(double angleChange)
      Rotate the the Renderable by a specified amount (in degrees)
      Parameters:
      angleChange - the amount to rotate (positive being clockwise and negative counter-clockwise).

    • angleTo

      public double angleTo(Location location)
      Get the angle between the Renderable and another Location
      Parameters:
      location - the Location to check
      Returns:
      the angle (in degrees) as a double between the Renderable and the passed Location

    • angleTo

      public double angleTo(Renderable renderable)
      Get the angle between this Renderable and another
      Parameters:
      renderable - the Renderable to get the angle to
      Returns:
      the angle (in degrees) as a double between this Renderable and the passed Renderable

      Parameters:
      location - the Location to rotate towards

      public void lookAt(Renderable renderable)

      renderable - the Renderable to look towards

      Returns:
